title: MatchResult
description: Per-participant final result for a match. For standard home/away matches there is exactly one row with participant_id=NULL carrying home + away scores together. For multi-team meets (galas / festivals) there is one row per match_participant carrying that participant's score / time / distance / apparatus. Scoring is sport-agnostic — the ScoringStrategyResolver decides which columns are used per sport. Belongs to Tenant + Match (CASCADE). Optionally references MatchParticipant. NEVER carries application_id, region_id, organization_id, or scope_node_id.

participant_id.description: NULL for standard home/away matches (one result row aggregates both sides). NOT NULL for multi-team meets — one result row per participant.

period_scores_json.description: Array of per-period scores for score-based sports with periods (halves / quarters / sets). Shape: [{ label: 'Q1', home: 2, away: 1 }] for team sports; [{ label: 'Set 1', score: 25 }] for individual sets.

final_score_home.description: Home-side final score for score-based sports on standard matches. NULL for time-scored / distance-scored / apparatus-scored / multi-team.

final_score_away.description: Away-side final score. Same nullability rules as final_score_home.

time_recorded_seconds.description: Time-scored result in seconds with millisecond precision. NULL for non-time-scored sports.

distance_recorded_meters.description: Distance-scored result in metres. NULL for non-distance-scored sports.

apparatus_scores_json.description: Apparatus-scored result. Shape: [{ apparatus: 'floor', difficulty: 5.4, execution: 8.9, penalty: 0.1, total: 14.2 }]. Sport-strategy-specific.

outcome.description: Enum: win / draw / loss. Relative to team_id on standard matches; relative to the participant on multi-team. NULL for individual (non-competitive) sports.

motm_athlete_id.description: Man-of-the-match award. Must reference an athlete on this match's squad.

published_at.description: Set on POST /results/publish. Fires MatchResultPublished + kicks the standings recompute.

x-invariants: final_score_home IS NOT NULL implies final_score_away IS NOT NULL (and vice versa)
outcome='win' AND participant_id IS NULL implies final_score_home > final_score_away
outcome='draw' AND participant_id IS NULL implies final_score_home = final_score_away
outcome='loss' AND participant_id IS NULL implies final_score_home < final_score_away
at least one of {final_score_home, time_recorded_seconds, distance_recorded_meters, apparatus_scores_json} IS NOT NULL — a result must record SOMETHING
motm_athlete_id, when set, must correspond to a match_squad_entries row with match_id=this.match_id and role IN ('starter','substitute')
published_at IMMUTABLE once set — un-publish deletes + recreates
unique (match_id, participant_id) when participant_id IS NOT NULL — one result per participant per match
unique (match_id) WHERE participant_id IS NULL — one standard-result row per match
